title: Cursed Fate: Unsealed (Progression Addon)
description: a addon that implements books used to toggle to progression system in cursed fate by huragan. Recomended for server use and if you just want a challange.
body:
This addon expands Cursed Fate by introducing two new gamerules and five progression-control items designed for modpacks and servers.
Its main goal is to make Cursed Fate easier to balance, easier to integrate, and less intrusive for players who don’t want to fully commit to the original progression system.

**New Gamerules:**
1) Disable Cursed Fate Max HP Changes
2) Special Progression Mode
    -Removes any innate techniques player is born with
    -You can't get weapon/melee mastery
    -You can't get player level / innate mastery past 40
This gamerule gives modpack creators full control over how fast (or slow) players advance, and prevents Cursed Fate from dominating progression.

**Both gamerules are disabled by default:**
• /cursedfate Gamerule Healthscaling = true (Cursed Fate can change max HP normally)
• /cursedfate Gamerule LevelCaps = false (standard Cursed Fate progression is untouched)


**Progression Items:**
These items act as “permissions” to progress further.
They do not spawn naturally and are intended to be placed or configured by modpack/server creators.

• Unlock Melee Potential Book – Grants 10 Melee Mastery and allows further leveling
• Unlock Weapon Potential Book – Grants 10 Weapon Mastery and allows further leveling
• Unlock Potential I / II / III – Unlocks level caps 60 / 80 / 100 for Player Level and Innate Mastery
• Unlock Innate Technique Potential Book – Gives the player a random innate technique
• Reset All Progression Book – Fully resets all Cursed Fate progression
• Unlock Potential IV - As of right now it does nothing, It's leftover dev item for testing.

**This addon is not designed for default survival play.
Instead, it provides tools that can be integrated with curated progression systems, quests and custom drop tables. Perfect for modpacks, servers, and custom progression-based worlds.**

_(If there is enough interest, I may add a proper survival progression path in the future.)
(Mod was tested with cursedfate-1.0.28, geckolib-forge-1.20.1-4.8.2, kleiders_custom_renderer-7.4.1-forge-1.20.1, photon-forge-1.20.1-1.1.14, player-animation-lib-forge-1.0.2-rc1+1.20 )_
**Please use Forge version 47.4.10+**
